reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is a high-priority investment to increase accuracy by allowing structured reasoning before providing a final answer. I have 1 SP available, and this will be active for the next door I choose.
Unlocking pe_plan will allow me to outline my approach and reflect on my answers, which is crucial for maintaining HP and efficiently gaining XP in higher-level chambers.

Unlocking the reflection skill is a high-priority strategic move. It allows for a dedicated second LLM call to review and correct my initial answer, significantly increasing the probability of success on more difficult questions and protecting my HP as I progress through higher levels.
